nl_question: What drugs treat type 2 diabetes mellitus?

verification_guide.summary: 5 drugs from 5 distinct pharmacological classes (biguanide, sulfonylurea, DPP-4 inhibitor, SGLT2 inhibitor, GLP-1 receptor agonist). Each is FDA-approved for T2D and verified against a primary regulatory source. Each is also returned by PloverDB for the gold query.
sources_used: MedlinePlus drug information page (NIH consumer-facing): used for metformin
DailyMed FDA-approved drug label (NIH regulatory): used for the other 4 drugs
verification_guide.how_to_verify_a_medlineplus_entry: Open the URL. Use the right-side TOC or scroll to the section titled "Why is this medication prescribed?" — the FIRST paragraph under that heading is the indication. The exact_quote field is verbatim from that paragraph.
verification_guide.how_to_verify_a_dailymed_entry: Open the URL. At the top of the label there is a box titled "HIGHLIGHTS OF PRESCRIBING INFORMATION". The FIRST numbered subsection (1) is INDICATIONS AND USAGE — that subsection contains the exact_quote. For multi-indication drugs (JARDIANCE, FARXIGA), the T2D indication is one bullet among several; the per-entity where_on_page field calls out which.
verification_guide.cross_check_with_ploverdb: Each verified_answer's CURIE was confirmed present in the PloverDB result set for the gold one-hop query (n0=MONDO:0005148, n1=biolink:Drug, e0=biolink:treats from drug to disease). PloverDB returned 126 drug CURIEs total; the 5 here are a curated class-representative subset.

evidence.publisher: U.S. National Library of Medicine — MedlinePlus
evidence.where_on_page: On the MedlinePlus metformin page, scroll to (or use the right-side TOC for) the section titled "Why is this medication prescribed?" — the FIRST paragraph under that heading is the indication. The quote opens the paragraph.
evidence.exact_quote: Metformin is used alone or with other medications, including insulin, to treat type 2 diabetes (condition in which the body does not use insulin normally and, therefore, cannot control the amount of sugar in the blood).

evidence.publisher: U.S. National Library of Medicine — DailyMed
evidence.section_heading: INDICATIONS AND USAGE (Highlights of Prescribing Information, section 1)
evidence.where_on_page: On the DailyMed page, at the top of the FDA label, find the box titled "HIGHLIGHTS OF PRESCRIBING INFORMATION". The FIRST numbered subsection (1) is INDICATIONS AND USAGE — the quoted sentence is the single-paragraph contents of that subsection.
evidence.exact_quote: GLUCOTROL XL is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.

evidence.publisher: U.S. National Library of Medicine — DailyMed
evidence.section_heading: INDICATIONS AND USAGE (Highlights of Prescribing Information, section 1)
evidence.where_on_page: On the DailyMed JANUVIA page, the top of the label has "HIGHLIGHTS OF PRESCRIBING INFORMATION". The FIRST numbered subsection (1) is INDICATIONS AND USAGE — the quoted sentence is that subsection's opening line.
evidence.exact_quote: JANUVIA is a dipeptidyl peptidase-4 (DPP-4) inhibitor indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.

evidence.publisher: U.S. National Library of Medicine — DailyMed
evidence.section_heading: INDICATIONS AND USAGE (Highlights of Prescribing Information, section 1)
evidence.where_on_page: On the DailyMed JARDIANCE page, the top of the label has "HIGHLIGHTS OF PRESCRIBING INFORMATION". Section (1) INDICATIONS AND USAGE has a bulleted list — the quoted bullet is the one starting "As an adjunct to diet and exercise...". (JARDIANCE has 4 indications listed; the T2D bullet is among them.)
evidence.exact_quote: JARDIANCE is a sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitor indicated: ... As an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults and pediatric patients aged 10 years and older with type 2 diabetes mellitus.

evidence.publisher: U.S. National Library of Medicine — DailyMed
evidence.section_heading: INDICATIONS AND USAGE (Highlights of Prescribing Information, section 1)
evidence.where_on_page: On the DailyMed page, the top of the label has "HIGHLIGHTS OF PRESCRIBING INFORMATION". Section (1) INDICATIONS AND USAGE has a bulleted list (RYBELSUS and OZEMPIC tablets are indicated: ...) — the FIRST bullet is the T2D indication.
evidence.exact_quote: RYBELSUS and OZEMPIC tablets are indicated: as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
